title: Codex visual review S15 panel a3

payload.failure_mode_positive_invariant: executor蓝hoodie棕发无须、reviewer绿hoodie黑发有须稳定;图内无字,中央大面积低细节留白可承接HTML气泡
payload.notes: Codex visual reviewer (GPT-5.5 xhigh) independent read of panels/S15_panel_a03.png。双人身份锁定:executor 蓝 hoodie 棕发无须、reviewer 绿 hoodie 黑发有须,与 identity_refs 一致,identity_consistency=5。像素 chibi + 深蓝 wiki void 霓虹配色统一,style_consistency=5。构图可读、视线导向干净,composition_readability=4。图内无可读文字/伪代码字形(stray_text_present=false),仅极轻微噪点,artifact_severity=1。中央大面积低细节留白可承接 HTML 气泡(safezone_present=true)。正向不变量:executor蓝hoodie棕发无须、reviewer绿hoodie黑发有须稳定;图内无字,中央大面积低细节留白可承接HTML气泡。
